panels.title: RPC duration

targets.expr: min by (run_uuid, run_name, method) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])))

avg by (run_uuid, run_name, method) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])))

quantile by (run_uuid, run_name, method) (0.90, sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])))

max by (run_uuid, run_name, method) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])))

panels.description: Per-worker five-minute event mean summarized by method as min, equal-worker average, worker p90, and max, plus the solid p95 pooled across all RPC events.

panels.title: RPC blocking duration

targets.expr: min by (run_uuid, run_name, method) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_blocking_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_blocking_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])))

avg by (run_uuid, run_name, method) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_blocking_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_blocking_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])))

quantile by (run_uuid, run_name, method) (0.90, sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_blocking_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_blocking_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])))

max by (run_uuid, run_name, method) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_blocking_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, method, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rpc_blocking_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",method=~"run_controller_and_vehicle|drive|submit_egomotion_observation|submit_image_observation|submit_route|ground_intersection|render_rgb"}[5m])))

panels.description: Per-worker five-minute event mean summarized by method as min, equal-worker average, worker p90, and max, plus the solid p95 pooled across all blocking events.

panels.title: Rollout duration

targets.expr: min by (run_uuid, run_name) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])))

avg by (run_uuid, run_name) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])))

quantile by (run_uuid, run_name) (0.90, sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])))

max by (run_uuid, run_name) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])))

panels.description: Per-worker five-minute event mean rollout duration summarized as min, equal-worker average, worker p90, and max, plus the solid p95 pooled across all events.

panels.title: Step duration

targets.expr: min by (run_uuid, run_name) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_step_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_step_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])))

avg by (run_uuid, run_name) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_step_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_step_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])))

quantile by (run_uuid, run_name) (0.90, sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_step_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_step_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])))

max by (run_uuid, run_name) (sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_step_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_step_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[5m])))

panels.description: Per-worker five-minute event mean step duration summarized as min, equal-worker average, worker p90, and max, plus the solid p95 pooled across all events.

targets.expr: alpasim:process_cpu_utilization_percent:per_process:rate30s{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"} and on (run_uuid, run_name, groupname, pid, port, instance) topk by (groupname) (3, max_over_time(alpasim:process_cpu_utilization_percent:per_process:rate30s{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name"}[$__range] @ end()))

Renderer active rollouts
panels.description: Total executing renderer-backed rollouts across selected workers.

panels.title: Rollout starts by dispatch class
panels.description: Five-minute rollout-start rate split by scheduler decision.

panels.title: Scene replication effectiveness

targets.expr: sum by (run_uuid, run_name) (rate(alpasim_renderer_rollouts_started_total{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",worker_id=~"$worker_id",kind="cold_replica"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name) (rate(alpasim_renderer_rollouts_started_total{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",worker_id=~"$worker_id",kind="cold_initial"}[5m]))

panels.description: Cold-replica overhead relative to initial scene loads.

panels.title: Scheduler wait p95

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (run_uuid, run_name, le, kind) (rate(alpasim_renderer_scheduler_wait_seconds_bucket{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",worker_id=~"$worker_id"}[5m])))

panels.description: Five-minute p95 time from scheduler insertion to successful renderer assignment.

panels.title: Rollout duration by worker

targets.expr: sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_sum{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",worker_id=~"$worker_id"}[5m])) / sum by (run_uuid, run_name, worker_id) (rate(alpasim_rollout_duration_seconds_count{run_uuid=~"$run_uuid",run_name=~"$run_name",worker_id=~"$worker_id"}[5m]))

panels.description: Five-minute event mean and event p95 for each AlpaSim worker.
